summary: Add durable algorithmic_dimension field to FAIL-009 capturing pipeline-canonical silent-ignore
detail:
Rather than another FAIL-009.outcome numerical refresh (which goes stale every 12h and is now in its third iteration this week), ADD a durable structural field to the FAIL-009 entry capturing the observation that silent-ignore has survived two consecutive ECM Daily Review auto-regens. Suggested field name: algorithmic_dimension (or alternately, extend outcome with a sentence tagged "Algorithmic dimension:" and a counter).

Suggested content: "Silent-ignore is PIPELINE-CANONICAL. ECM Daily Review auto-regens on 2026-04-22T07:06:28Z (a149edf) and 2026-04-23T07:09:39Z (c07c38f) both held registry_ratio_pct=94.5 with confirmed=69 / prospective=10 / refined=4 unchanged, without treating the expired-but-unadjudicated PRED-105 window as a refinement. build_daily_review.py logic keys off explicit FALSIFIED labels and has no concept of window-expired-without-adjudication. The exclusion survives each auto-regen tick; the author still has the refined bucket available and has not used it."

This observation is structural (does not go stale numerically) and captures the genuine new data point of this poll. Future auto-regen days can increment a consecutive-auto-regens counter inside the field instead of recreating the structural observation every time.
do_not_touch: outcome (leave numerical state alone; decider already refreshed to 118h ~7h ago)
